case_title: JOHN ROBERT MARTIN VS. CATHERINE MACFEE, INC. DBA RUBICON COLLECTION

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN, JOHN ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CATHERINE MACFEE, INC. DBA RUBICON COLLECTION $7,130.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,215.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-18-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CATHERINE MACFEE, INC. DBA RUBICON COLLECTION
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN, JOHN ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT CATHERINE MACFEE, INC. DBA RUBICON COLLECTION
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CATHERINE MACFEE, INC. DBA RUBICON COLLECTION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,130.00 FILED BY MARTIN, JOHN ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT CATHERINE MACFEE, INC. DBA RUBICON COLLECTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2011 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-18-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-18-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 5/18/11 TO CATHERINE MACFEE, INC. DBA RUBICON COLLECTION
